name: Meningococcal Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for meningococcal vaccines including MenACWY (conjugate) and MenB (serogroup B) formulations. Used in immunizations for adolescents (IMA) measure. MenACWY is routinely recommended at ages 11-12 with a booster at 16.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Meningococcal polysaccharide vaccine, serogroups A, C, Y, W-135, diphtheria toxoid conjugate (MenACWY-D, Menactra)
Meningococcal polysaccharide vaccine, serogroups A, C, Y, W-135, CRM197 conjugate (MenACWY-CRM, Menveo)
Meningococcal polysaccharide vaccine, serogroups A, C, Y, W-135, tetanus toxoid conjugate (MenACWY-TT, MenQuadfi)
Meningococcal groups C and Y and Hib conjugate vaccine (MenHibrix)
Meningococcal B vaccine, fully recombinant (MenB-4C, Bexsero)
Meningococcal B vaccine, recombinant, OMV, adjuvanted (MenB-FHbp, Trumenba)
Meningococcal polysaccharide vaccine, serogroups A, B, C, W, Y (MenABCWY, Penbraya)
Meningococcal conjugate vaccine, serogroups A, C, Y, W-135 (MenACWY or MCV4), for intramuscular use
Meningococcal conjugate vaccine, serogroups A, C, Y, W-135, tetanus toxoid carrier (MenACWY-TT), for intramuscular use
Meningococcal recombinant protein and outer membrane vesicle vaccine, serogroup B (MenB-4C), 2 dose schedule, for intramuscular use
Meningococcal recombinant lipoprotein vaccine, serogroup B (MenB-FHbp), 3 dose schedule, for intramuscular use
